channel.title: AI Unfiltered
channel.description: Chinese AI • Open Source • Security • Incidents. Signal, not noise.

item.title: Tencent HY Poaches OpenAI Researcher Tian Yonglong to Lead Multimodal AI
item.description: Tencent HY hires OpenAI research scientist Tian Yonglong as new multimodal model lead, reporting to chief AI scientist Yao Shunyu in the latest high-profile AI talent raid.

item.title: Network Performance Issues in London
item.description: Jul 8, 02:32 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. Jul 8, 01:56 UTC Monitoring - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results. Jul 8, 01:56 UTC Investigating - Cloudflare is investigating issues with Network Performance in London. Some customers may experience increased...

item.title: [AINews] Lilian Weng summarizes 35 papers on Harness Engineering for RSI
item.description: a quiet day lets us read some condensed insight

item.title: AI Computing Reaches for Space: Nayuta Space Targets Orbital Data Center Constellation
item.description: China's Nayuta Space unveils Alaya orbital computing constellation, planning 12,500 AI compute satellites in sun-synchronous orbit with aerodynamic rocket recovery.

item.title: China's Semiconductor Equipment Components Industry Gains Momentum
item.description: Chinese semiconductor equipment makers build all-domestic-component test machines, as local parts suppliers like ACM Research, Foxconn Precision, and Feilihua accelerate import substitution.

item.title: ByteDance Seedance: How China's Video-Gen Model Turned the Tide
item.description: ByteDance's Seedance 2.0 becomes China's first overwhelmingly dominant video generation model, achieving 70-90% gross margins and redefining the AI business model.

item.title: Huawei Reworks 5nm: Tao's Law Delivers Kirin 2026 With Logic Folding Breakthrough
item.description: Huawei's Tao's Law V2 paper reveals Kirin 2026 with Logic Folding, boosting transistor density to 175MTr/mm² without advanced EUV lithography.

item.title: From Hugging Face to Amazon SageMaker Studio in one click
Elevated errors for some models
item.description: Jul 7, 20:28 UTC Identified - We have seen success rates return to normal, but we are continuing to work to fully resolve this issue and ensure no further recurrences. Jul 7, 20:02 UTC Investigating - We are investigating elevated errors on requests to some models. We will provide an update as soon...

item.title: Cloudflare Registrar operations issues
item.description: Jul 7, 17:49 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. Jul 7, 15:41 UTC Investigating - Cloudflare is aware of and investigating an issue with Cloudflare Registrar that may prevent customers from registering, renewing, updating and transferring domains.Further detail will be provided as more...

item.title: County Government Reportedly Paid $1 Million to Cyber Extortion Group
item.description: The alleged victim, believed to be a small Ohio county, reportedly paid the extortion group to prevent the public release of sensitive stolen data. The post County Government Reportedly Paid $1 Million to Cyber Extortion Group appeared first on SecurityWeek.

item.title: Critical Gitea Flaw Under Active Exploitation, Researchers Warn
item.description: Attackers are exploiting the critical Gitea vulnerability CVE-2026-20896 to bypass authentication with a single HTTP header and access vulnerable repositories and secrets. The post Critical Gitea Flaw Under Active Exploitation, Researchers Warn appeared first on SecurityWeek.

item.title: RedWing MaaS Packages Android Bank Fraud as a Telegram Rental Service
item.description: A new Android malware operation called RedWing is being rented out on Telegram as a ready-made bank-fraud service. It lets even low-skill criminals take over a victim's phone, steal their banking logins, and capture the one-time codes that protect their accounts. Zimperium's zLabs, which found the...

item.title: Rogue Agent Flaw Could Have Let Attackers Hijack Google Dialogflow CX Chatbots
item.description: A critical flaw in Google's Dialogflow CX could have let an attacker with edit rights on one Code Block-enabled agent compromise other Code Block-enabled agents in the same Google Cloud project. From there, they could read live conversations, steal the data users shared, and make the bots send...

item.title: Hugging Face Models on Foundry Managed Compute
DEBULL Tooling Abuses Microsoft Device-Code Flow to Target M365 Accounts
item.description: A Microsoft 365 device code phishing campaign has been observed leveraging collaboration-themed lures to take control of victim accounts between the last week of June 2026 and into early July, per findings from ZeroBEC. "The campaign did not depend on a fake Microsoft password page. It used a...

item.title: Actions and Codespaces APIs experiencing partial failures
item.description: Jul 7, 14:32 UTC Update - Codespaces is experiencing degraded availability. We are continuing to investigate. Jul 7, 14:14 UTC Update - Customers accessing the Actions and Codespaces REST APIs may see 500 class errors a small percentage of the time.Actions runs in progress are continuing...

item.title: Public GitHub Issue Could Trick GitHub Agentic Workflows Into Leaking Private Repo Data
item.description: A public issue can trick GitHub Agentic Workflows into leaking the contents of an organization's private repositories, researchers at Noma Security have shown. The attacker needs only to open a normal-looking issue on a public repository, with no stolen credentials and no access to the...

item.title: DNS Zone Transfer Issues
item.description: Jul 7, 14:00 UTC Resolved - Secondary DNS zone transfers (AXFR/IXFR) using legacy IP addresses may have experienced intermittent failures between 14:50 and 16:10 UTC. The underlying issue has been corrected and all zone transfers are now operating normally.

item.title: Court Filing Reveals Windows Device ID Helped FBI Trace Alleged Scattered Spider Hacker
item.description: U.S. prosecutors linked an alleged Scattered Spider hacker to a break-in at a luxury jewelry retailer using a persistent Windows device ID, according to a newly unsealed federal complaint. Microsoft records tied that ID first to the account the attackers used to keep access during the May 2025...

item.title: CISA Reportedly Using Anthropic’s Mythos to Scan Government Software for Flaws
item.description: The audits are reportedly being spearheaded by CISA’s Attack Surface Evaluation team, a specialized unit tasked with conducting digital defense assessments and simulated hacking exercises. The post CISA Reportedly Using Anthropic’s Mythos to Scan Government Software for Flaws appeared first on...

item.title: Critical Adobe ColdFusion Vulnerability Exploited in Attacks
item.description: Hackers are exploiting a recently patched critical vulnerability (CVE-2026-48282) in Adobe ColdFusion that carries a CVSS score of 10/10. The post Critical Adobe ColdFusion Vulnerability Exploited in Attacks appeared first on SecurityWeek.

item.title: Iran-Linked Hackers Using Modular C&C Framework in Cyberattacks
item.description: Researchers say the Iran-linked threat actor used an adaptable modular malware framework and compromised IT service providers to reach high-value targets in Israel. The post Iran-Linked Hackers Using Modular C&C Framework in Cyberattacks appeared first on SecurityWeek.

item.title: Elevated errors with image generation in ChatGPT
item.description: Status: IdentifiedWe have identified the issue and are implementing a mitigation. Some users may continue to experience errors with image generation in ChatGPT while we implement the mitigation.Affected components Image Generation (Degraded performance)

item.title: The Download: your stake in OpenAI, and the Treasury’s AI warning
item.description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Your family’s $300 stake in OpenAI Sam Altman’s proposal that Americans should share in the wealth created by AI is back in the spotlight, with...

item.title: Cyber Shield: The path to an agentic AI future for cyber defence
item.description: Why the UK is pioneering an initiative to develop a national scale, sovereign defence capability

item.title: The foundational elements of AI architecture that IT leaders need to scale
item.description: With the rapid progress of AI capabilities and the move to agentic systems, organizations are expanding their use cases as the technology continues to grow. That constant evolution also introduces risk, leaving IT leaders to wonder which investments will prove valuable even six months into the...

item.title: New members invitations to accounts not being sent
item.description: Jul 7, 10:22 UTC Investigating - Cloudflare is investigating issues with invites for new members of accounts that are not being sent to the invitees, impacting their ability to join organizations.We are working to mitigate this problem. More updates to follow shortly.

item.title: Why worms (and microbes) are catching on as a manure pollution solution
item.description: Anthony Agueda, a third-generation California dairy farmer, pulls a rake through a bed of dark, wet wood chips on his family’s land in Hickman, a tiny town in the state’s agricultural heartland. He reaches down with both hands and pulls up a clump of muck, turning it over to reveal a half-dozen...

item.title: Elevated errors on Claude Sonnet 5
item.description: Jul 7, 07:37 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. Jul 7, 06:58 UTC Investigating - We are currently investigating this issue.

item.title: [AINews] The Field Guide to Fable
item.description: a quiet day lets us digest the world's most significant model launch... to date.

item.title: iFLYTEK-Embodied-Omni Technical Report
item.description: arXiv:2607.02542v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: General-purpose embodied agents must understand multimodal instructions, anticipate how their environment will evolve, and produce precise control actions over extended horizons. Existing approaches typically specialize in visual-language reasoning,...

item.title: Internal Pluralism and the Limits of Pairwise Comparisons
item.description: arXiv:2607.02672v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Local pairwise comparisons are a standard tool for learning how people want decision rules to work, e.g., in participatory design or alignment. However, their use builds in two strong assumptions: that local comparisons are sufficient evidence about...

item.title: ASK in the Dark: Uncertainty-Gated LLM Assistance under Partial Observability
item.description: arXiv:2607.02686v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Reinforcement learning agents operating under partial observability must act on incomplete information, making them natural candidates for guidance from small language models (SLMs) that carry broad reasoning priors. Yet integrating SLM guidance into...

item.title: Automated Data Readiness for Scientific AI
item.description: arXiv:2607.02771v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Leadership computing facilities steward large-scale scientific datasets that routinely require substantial transformation before serving as AI training data. However, no existing framework fully unifies automated transformation, readiness assessment,...

item.title: SwarmResearch: Orchestrating Coding Agents for Open-Ended Discovery
item.description: arXiv:2607.02807v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Long-running coding agents such as autoresearch can persistently discover optimizations for open-ended problems. However, they tend to converge onto a single high-level approach, then proceed with low-level edits while missing other superior...

item.title: Auditing the Audit: Five Failure Modes in Benchmark-Validity Audits
item.description: arXiv:2607.02586v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Governance frameworks ask AI providers and auditors for documented evaluation evidence, and perturbation-based construct-validity audits are a common form of that evidence. We argue the audits are themselves fragile: their conclusions can be silently...

item.title: Evaluating Time Series Foundation Models for Electricity Price Forecasting: Contamination Risk, Distributional Shifts, and Covariate Dependence
item.description: arXiv:2607.02623v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Time series foundation models (TSFMs) have shown strong zero-shot forecasting performance, but their generalization in covariate-driven, non-stationary settings is underexplored. Electricity price forecasting (EPF) presents a challenging testbed due...

item.title: QuantFlow: A Federated Mamba-Based Post-Transformer Foundation Model for Time-Series Forecasting
item.description: arXiv:2607.02632v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Time-series forecasting supports decisions in finance, en-ergy, transportation, public health, and industrial monitoring. Recent foundation models improve transfer across forecast-ing tasks, but many depend on centralized data and Trans-former...

item.title: GRAFT: Grafted Reference Audio for Fine-grained Pronunciation in Zero-shot Text-to-Speech
item.description: arXiv:2607.02633v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We present GRAFT, a per-word pronunciation conditioning mechanism for text-to-speech neural codec language modeling. Existing systems reach high intelligibility and naturalness but inherit the ambiguity of text and mispronounce rare proper nouns,...

item.title: Federated Learning for Object Detection: Enabling Collaborative Drone Learning Without Centralizing Data
item.description: arXiv:2607.02636v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Object detection is a fundamental capability for AI-driven perception in safety-critical drone and edge-vision systems, including disaster response, operational security environments, infrastructure monitoring and defense applications. Robust model...

item.title: Improving LLMs via Validator-to-Generator Alignment
item.description: arXiv:2607.02668v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models are inconsistent: varying prompts or including unrelated information can lead to unexpected changes in model outputs. The generator-validator (G-V) gap is one manifestation of this phenomenon, where LLMs generate responses that...

item.title: Echoes of Unrest: A Multimodal NLP Framework for Early Warning of Fake News and Violence-Driven Mob Activity
item.description: arXiv:2607.02734v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Rapid growth in social media has transformed global communication by enabling fast information exchange, but it has also accelerated the spread of misinformation. Fake news, manipulated content, and provocative narratives are increasingly linked to...

item.title: Reinforcement Learning for Data-Efficient Code-Switched ASR
item.description: arXiv:2607.02757v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Audio-language models can be prompted for code-switched speech, but their decoding is not optimized for code-switching and often fails at language boundaries. We propose a practical reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards recipe for...

item.title: LuxSQA: Ask Me in Luxembourgish with TTS-Augmented Spoken Question Answering
item.description: arXiv:2607.02763v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Spoken Question Answering (SQA) remains largely focused on high-resource languages and carefully recorded speech, limiting the reach of speech-LLM methods in low-resource settings. This paper investigates whether text-to-speech (TTS) can provide...

item.title: Gemma 4 Technical Report
item.description: arXiv:2607.02770v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We introduce Gemma 4, a new generation of open-weight, natively multimodal language models in the Gemma model family. Designed to advance compute efficiency and reasoning, the Gemma 4 model suite features dense and Mixture-of-Experts architectures,...

item.title: Claude Tag seeing elevated GitHub operation failures
item.description: Jul 6, 21:49 UTC Investigating - We are currently investigating elevated error rates on calls made Claude Tag. Our team is actively working to identify the root cause. You may experience errors such as GitHub operations denied.

item.title: Durable Objects Increased Error Rate in ENAM
item.description: Jul 7, 00:42 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. Jul 6, 23:41 UTC Monitoring - A fix has been implemented and we are currently monitoring the results. Jul 6, 22:56 UTC Identified - Cloudflare has identified issue causing an increase of errors for Durable Objects and downstream services...

item.title: LeRobot v0.6.0: Imagine, Evaluate, Improve
Run AI workloads on any cloud, store on Hugging Face: zero-egress storage with SkyPilot
